records.author: Staff
records.title: Schneider Electric to invest $700M in U.S. operations as AI and energy demand rise
records.body: Schneider Electric said it plans to invest $700 million in U.S. operations over multiple years, including manufacturing capacity, automation, and energy infrastructure upgrades tied to growing AI and electrification demand.

records.author: Staff
records.title: Hitachi Energy plans new transformer factory and plant expansions to meet grid demand
records.body: Hitachi Energy outlined plans for a new transformer factory and additional plant expansions as utilities and large load customers increase demand for grid equipment.

records.author: Staff
records.title: Developer starts construction on 250MW AI data center campus with liquid cooling
records.body: A developer has started construction on a 250MW data center campus designed for AI workloads, including liquid cooling infrastructure and phased power delivery.

records.author: Staff
records.title: Photonics suppliers partner on optical roadmap for AI clusters
records.body: Several photonics suppliers announced a partnership around optical interconnect roadmaps for AI clusters, but the article does not describe new construction, plant expansion, or signed supply commitments.

records.author: Staff
records.title: Networking vendors form joint venture for AI interconnect systems
records.body: Two networking vendors formed a joint venture focused on AI interconnect systems. The article describes product development goals but no current buildout, order, or capacity expansion commitment.

records.author: Staff
records.title: Why manufacturers are rethinking innovation culture
records.body: A management-focused article about innovation culture and executive decision-making with no specific construction, capacity, procurement, or financing event.
